Additionally, in accordance with 42 U.S.C. Section 1320b-10, no person may, for a fee, reproduce, reprint, or distribute any item consisting of a form, application, or other publication of the United States Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) unless such person has obtained specific, written authorization for such activity. Therefore, if you wish to sell the CDC materials presented on CDC’s website, you must first obtain permission to do so from CDC.
